user.title: General settings and functions
user.description: Choose the instance name, room, covers, and automation functions to set up.

automation_features.name: Automation functions
automation_features.description: Only enabled functions are configured, exposed as switches, and evaluated by the controller.

data.auto_time_enabled: Time control - open in the morning and close in the evening
data.auto_ventilate_enabled: Ventilation and lockout - react to window contacts
data.auto_sun_enabled: Sun elevation - add sun-height based open/close behavior
data.auto_shading_enabled: Shading - partially close during direct sun
data.resident_status_enabled: Resident mode - respect sleep and wake-up state

data_description.auto_time_enabled: Enables daily opening and closing windows. Internally, opening and closing are toggled together.
data_description.auto_ventilate_enabled: Uses full-open and tilt contacts. Full-open moves to the open position, tilted moves to the ventilation position; awnings are excluded.
data_description.auto_brightness_enabled: Adds brightness thresholds to the time logic. Useful when it gets bright or dark earlier than the schedule.
data_description.auto_sun_enabled: Adds sun elevation thresholds to the time logic. This is not the shading function.
data_description.auto_shading_enabled: Moves to the shading position when sun position and brightness match, then restores later.
data_description.resident_status_enabled: Blocks regular opening while the resident sensor is active. Closing when going to sleep can happen immediately.
data_description.additional_conditions_enabled: Allows optional Home Assistant conditions for the whole automation or individual actions.

windows.title: Assign window sensors
windows.description: Map contact sensors to each cover for ventilation lockout.

schedule.title: Helper sensors and thresholds
schedule.description: Only sections for enabled functions are shown. Positions are the base targets for all movements.

data_description.open_position: Target position when opening. For blinds usually 100; for awnings often 0.
data_description.close_position: Target position when closing. For blinds usually 0; for awnings often 100.
data_description.ventilate_position: Target position for tilted windows. Not used for awnings.
data_description.position_tolerance: Absolute tolerance used when comparing the current position with a target.

shading.title: Brightness, sun, shading, and manual override
shading.description: Set thresholds for enabled functions and define how manual position changes are handled.

data.shading_end_immediate_by_sun_position: End shading quickly when sun leaves range
data.manual_override_block_open: Ignore next automatic opening after manual changes
data.manual_override_block_close: Ignore next automatic closing after manual changes
data.manual_override_block_ventilate: Ignore next automatic ventilation after manual changes
data.manual_override_block_shading: Ignore next automatic sun shading after manual changes

data_description.brightness_sensor: Sensor used for brightness-based opening and closing.
data_description.brightness_open_above: Opening may run once brightness stays above this value.
data_description.brightness_close_below: Closing may run once brightness stays below this value.
data_description.sun_elevation_open: Opening may run once the sun is high enough.
data_description.sun_elevation_close: Closing may run once the sun is low enough.
data_description.shading_azimuth_start: Minimum azimuth where the sun can hit the window.
data_description.shading_azimuth_end: Maximum azimuth where the sun can hit the window.
data_description.shading_brightness_start: Brightness from which shading may start.
data_description.shading_brightness_end: Brightness below which shading may end.
data_description.shading_waitingtime_start: Delay used to avoid short shading activations.
data_description.shading_waitingtime_end: Delay used to avoid short shading releases.
data_description.shading_start_max_duration: Maximum time to keep a pending shading start valid.
data_description.shading_end_max_duration: Maximum time to keep a pending shading end valid.
data_description.shading_end_immediate_by_sun_position: Use a short delay when the sun leaves the configured range.
data_description.shading_forecast_sensor: Optional weather or forecast source for temperature and conditions.
data_description.shading_forecast_type: Choose daily, hourly, or current weather attributes.
data_description.shading_weather_conditions: Only allow shading for selected weather conditions.
data_description.temperature_sensor_indoor: Optional indoor temperature condition for shading protection.
data_description.temperature_sensor_outdoor: Optional outdoor temperature condition for shading protection.
data_description.temperature_threshold: Minimum measured temperature for temperature-based shading.
data_description.temperature_forecast_threshold: Minimum forecast temperature for forecast-based shading.
data_description.manual_override_minutes: Timeout after which manual override status is cleared.
data_description.manual_override_reset_mode: Choose whether manual override resets by time, timeout, or not automatically.
data_description.manual_override_reset_time: Daily time for clearing manual override status.
data_description.manual_override_block_open: Skip the next automatic opening after a manual movement.
data_description.manual_override_block_close: Skip the next automatic closing after a manual movement.
data_description.manual_override_block_ventilate: Skip the next automatic ventilation action after a manual movement.
data_description.manual_override_block_shading: Skip the next automatic shading action after a manual movement.

general.title: General configuration
general.description: Set instance name, room, and covers.

menu.title: Function menu
menu.description: Select a section, adjust settings, then apply them with "Save and close".

positions.title: Cover positions
positions.description: Set cover type, movement targets, tolerance, and tilt targets.

data_description.cover_type: Blinds use 0 as closed and 100 as open. Awnings commonly use the opposite direction.
data_description.open_position: Target position when opening. For blinds usually 100; for awnings often 0.
data_description.close_position: Target position when closing. For blinds usually 0; for awnings often 100.
data_description.ventilate_position: Target position for tilted windows. Not used for awnings.
data_description.position_tolerance: Absolute tolerance used when comparing the current position with a target.

time_control.title: Time control
time_control.description: Configure daily windows and optional calendar events used for automatic opening and closing.

data_description.workday_sensor: On means workday, off means free day; used to pick the matching time window.
data_description.calendar_entity: Optional calendar whose event titles define open or close windows.
data_description.calendar_open_title: Case-insensitive title fragment for calendar events that allow opening.
data_description.calendar_close_title: Case-insensitive title fragment for calendar events that allow closing.
data_description.time_up_early_workday: Opening may start after this time on workdays.
data_description.time_up_late_workday: Opening is forced at this time if all required conditions allow it.
data_description.time_down_early_workday: Closing may start after this time on workdays.
data_description.time_down_late_workday: Closing is forced at this time if all required conditions allow it.
data_description.time_up_early_non_workday: Opening may start after this time on free days.
data_description.time_up_late_non_workday: Opening is forced at this time on free days if allowed.
data_description.time_down_early_non_workday: Closing may start after this time on free days.
data_description.time_down_late_non_workday: Closing is forced at this time on free days if allowed.
data_description.workday_tomorrow_sensor: Optional helper for choosing the evening close window based on tomorrow.

contact_sensors.title: Contact sensors
contact_sensors.description: Configure how assigned full-open and tilt contacts trigger ventilation and lockout behavior.

data.contact_trigger_delay: Delay before reaction on contact change
data.lockout_tilt_close: Block close when tilt contact active
data.lockout_tilt_shading_start: Block shading start when tilt contact active
data.lockout_tilt_shading_end: Block shading end when tilt contact active

data_description.contact_trigger_delay: How long a contact change must remain stable before the cover reacts.
data_description.contact_status_delay: Delay before the current contact status is evaluated.
data_description.ventilation_delay_after_close: Wait this many seconds after closing contacts before restoring from ventilation.
data_description.ventilation_allow_higher_position: Allow ventilation even if the current cover position is already above the ventilation target.
data_description.ventilation_use_after_shading: After shading ends, use the ventilation position if a tilt contact is still active.
data_description.lockout_tilt_close: Prevent full closing while a tilt contact is active.
data_description.lockout_tilt_shading_start: Prevent shading from starting while a tilt contact is active.
data_description.lockout_tilt_shading_end: Prevent shading from ending while a tilt contact is active.

brightness.title: Brightness control
brightness.description: Brightness thresholds can complement time control for earlier or later opening and closing.

data_description.brightness_sensor: Illuminance sensor used for brightness conditions.
data_description.brightness_open_above: Opening is allowed when brightness rises above this value plus hysteresis.
data_description.brightness_close_below: Closing is allowed when brightness drops below this value minus hysteresis.
data_description.brightness_hysteresis: Buffer around thresholds to prevent rapid toggling.
data_description.brightness_time_duration: Brightness must stay above or below the threshold for this many seconds.

sun_elevation.title: Sun elevation control
sun_elevation.description: Select fixed, dynamic, or hybrid mode for open/close sun elevation thresholds.

data_description.sun_elevation_mode: Fixed uses the configured values; dynamic uses sensors; hybrid adds configured offsets to sensors.
data_description.sun_elevation_open: Fixed opening threshold, or offset in hybrid mode.
data_description.sun_elevation_close: Fixed closing threshold, or offset in hybrid mode.
data_description.sun_time_duration: Sun elevation must stay beyond the threshold for this many seconds.
data_description.sun_elevation_dynamic_open_sensor: Sensor or number helper that provides the dynamic opening threshold.
data_description.sun_elevation_dynamic_close_sensor: Sensor or number helper that provides the dynamic closing threshold.

behavior.title: Behavior
behavior.description: Blueprint safeguards: limit movement, prevent automatic returns, and block repeated daily actions.

data.prevent_higher_position_closing: Prevent closing from a higher position
data.prevent_lowering_when_closing_if_shaded: Prevent lowering while closing if already shaded
data.prevent_shading_end_if_closed: Do not end shading when cover is closed
data.prevent_opening_after_shading_end: Do not open after shading ends
data.prevent_opening_after_ventilation_end: Do not open after ventilation ends
data.prevent_opening_multiple_times: Prevent opening multiple times per day
data.prevent_closing_multiple_times: Prevent closing multiple times per day
data.prevent_shading_multiple_times: Prevent shading multiple times per day

data_description.prevent_higher_position_closing: Do not raise the cover before evening closing.
data_description.prevent_lowering_when_closing_if_shaded: If already shaded, do not lower further during closing.
data_description.prevent_shading_end_if_closed: Do not end shading when the cover is already closed.
data_description.prevent_opening_after_shading_end: Do not automatically open after shading ends.
data_description.prevent_opening_after_ventilation_end: Do not automatically open after ventilation ends.
data_description.prevent_opening_multiple_times: Run automatic opening at most once per day.
data_description.prevent_closing_multiple_times: Run automatic closing at most once per day.
data_description.prevent_shading_multiple_times: Start shading at most once per day.

shading.title: Shading control
shading.description: Shading reacts to direct sun using azimuth, elevation, brightness, optional forecast data, and additional conditions.

data.shading_end_immediate_by_sun_position: End shading quickly when sun leaves range

data_description.shading_azimuth_start: Minimum azimuth where the sun can hit the window.
data_description.shading_azimuth_end: Maximum azimuth where the sun can hit the window.
data_description.shading_elevation_min: Minimum sun elevation for starting shading.
data_description.shading_elevation_max: Maximum sun elevation for keeping shading active.
data_description.shading_brightness_start: Brightness from which shading may start.
data_description.shading_brightness_end: Brightness below which shading may end.
data_description.shading_waitingtime_start: Delay used to avoid short shading activations.
data_description.shading_waitingtime_end: Delay used to avoid short shading releases.
data_description.shading_start_max_duration: Maximum time to keep a pending shading start valid.
data_description.shading_end_max_duration: Maximum time to keep a pending shading end valid.
data_description.shading_end_immediate_by_sun_position: Use a short delay when the sun leaves the configured range.
data_description.shading_forecast_sensor: Optional weather or forecast source for temperature and conditions.
data_description.shading_forecast_type: Choose daily, hourly, or current weather attributes.
data_description.shading_weather_conditions: Only allow shading for selected weather conditions.
data_description.additional_condition_shading: Extra Home Assistant condition that must pass before shading starts.
data_description.additional_condition_shading_tilt: Extra condition for tilt movement while shaded.
data_description.additional_condition_shading_end: Extra Home Assistant condition that must pass before shading ends.

functions.title: Automation functions
functions.description: Enable or disable functions. Only active functions appear in the menu, are exposed as switches, and are evaluated by the controller.

data_description.auto_time_enabled: Opens and closes within configured time windows. Internally toggles opening and closing together.
data_description.auto_ventilate_enabled: Reacts to window contacts, moves tilted windows to ventilation position, and prevents lockout.
data_description.auto_brightness_enabled: Adds brightness thresholds to automatic opening and closing.
data_description.auto_sun_enabled: Adds sun elevation thresholds to automatic opening and closing. Do not confuse with shading.
data_description.auto_shading_enabled: Moves to the shading position when direct sun conditions match.
data_description.resident_status_enabled: Respects resident status: sleeping blocks regular opening, closing can happen immediately.
data_description.additional_conditions_enabled: Shows additional conditions for global approval and individual actions.
data_description.manual_control_enabled: Enables manual helper actions such as recalibration and clearing manual overrides.

resident.title: Resident mode
resident.description: Defines how sleep and wake-up state affect automation. All settings are optional.

data.resident_open_enabled: Enable automatic opening when resident wakes up (respects opening conditions)
data.resident_close_enabled: Enable automatic closing when resident goes to sleep (immediate)
data.resident_allow_shading: Allow sun protection while resident mode is active
data.resident_allow_open: Allow opening while resident mode is active
data.resident_allow_ventilation: Allow ventilation while resident mode is active

data_description.resident_sensor: On/true means resident mode is active, usually sleeping or quiet time.
data_description.resident_open_enabled: When the sensor turns off, opening may run if all normal opening conditions are met.
data_description.resident_close_enabled: When the sensor turns on, closing may run immediately.
data_description.resident_allow_shading: Allow shading even while resident mode blocks regular opening.
data_description.resident_allow_open: Allow regular opening even while resident mode is active.
data_description.resident_allow_ventilation: Allow ventilation movements even while resident mode is active.

additional_conditions.title: Additional conditions
additional_conditions.description: Optional conditions to control the full automation flow and individual actions dynamically.

data.additional_condition_shading: Additional condition when activating sun shading
data.additional_condition_shading_tilt: Additional condition for sun shading tilt
data.additional_condition_shading_end: Additional condition when deactivating sun shading

data_description.additional_condition_global: Must pass before any automatic action can run.
data_description.additional_condition_open: Must pass before automatic opening can run.
data_description.additional_condition_close: Must pass before automatic closing can run.
data_description.additional_condition_ventilate: Must pass before ventilation can start.
data_description.additional_condition_ventilate_end: Must pass before ventilation can end.
data_description.additional_condition_shading: Must pass before shading can start.
data_description.additional_condition_shading_tilt: Must pass before shading tilt can run.
data_description.additional_condition_shading_end: Must pass before shading can end.
